doc.controller: Deck policy the doctor asserts: no gyro, both trackpads active, hotkeys entered via View long-press; the generated VDF also maps the L4/R4 back grips to the same preset switch.
doc.radial: Ordered action ids for left-trackpad radial slots touch_menu_button_0..5 (group 20 in src/semu/bootstrap/templates/steam_input_template.vdf); every id must exist in the actions vocabulary above.
doc.quit_extra_bindings: app.quit always emits these bindings in addition to its keymap chord: xinput SELECT, xinput START, plain Esc, and Alt+F4 (was steamInputActionBindings in project_bootstrap.btrc).
doc.templates: Exactly one template carries default:true; it replaces the hardcoded neptune-full.vdf default while SEMU_STEAM_INPUT_TEMPLATE remains an env override. Outputs land in generated/packaging/input/steam-input/.
doc.key_names: semu-keymap-v1 key token to Steam VDF key-name lookup (was steamInputKeyName); unlisted keys upper-case verbatim in the emitter.
doc.device_identities: Target-owned physical-device identity constants formerly baked into emulator_profiles.btrc; a macos target ships different values with no btrc changes.
doc.platforms: templates_dir is the Steam controller template install destination; SEMU_STEAM_INPUT_DIR overrides it, and the installer prefers ${home}/.local/share/Steam when that root exists (steamRoot() in src/semu/steam/steam.btrc).
doc.actions: The semu-keymap-v1 action vocabulary (id -> alias for ${..._BINDINGS} tokens, label for radial/template text). Every action here must be bound in steamdeck.skm. Which emulators honor each action is declared per emulator in src/semu/emulators/<emu>/emulator.json input.actions; ui.escape is desktop-only and appears in no emulator list.
